name: write-commit-msg
description: Generate a semantic commit message from changes description

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Commit type (feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore)

messages.content:
You are an expert at writing semantic commit messages. Follow the conventional commits specification: type(scope): description

Types:
- feat: A new feature
- fix: A bug fix
- docs: Documentation changes
- style: Code style changes (formatting, etc.)
- refactor: Code refactoring
- test: Adding or updating tests
- chore: Maintenance tasks
